sglang.title: [Performance] Dynamic Batch Tokenizer
sglang.author: sundar24295s
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR introduces an AsyncDynamicBatchTokenizer that enables batching of tokenization requests to improve throughput and reduce latency for SGLang's tokenizer manager.

Performance Impact:

For Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B with 500 input tokens and 1 prompt per request at RPS 500, P99 latency i

sglang.title: [Generative Score API] Scoring(Prefill-only) optimizations.
sglang.author: sundar24295s
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
🚀 Motivation

Follow-up to PR #8840 to reduce latency and increase throughput for the generative score API.
Scoring only needs the next-token distribution after the full prompt, not per-token logprobs inside the prompt or any sampling.

Performance Impact:

On Qwen3-0.6B with 300 input tokens, at QP

sglang.title: Remove repeatedly lists adding in `init_incremental_detokenization`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Since incremental detokenization has been removed (see issue #10384), the old-fashioned method of calculating data for incremental detokenization is no longer necessary, which results in repeatedly adding lists and causing significant CPU overhead.

sglang.title: [Hack] Add pd-disaggregation decode polling interval
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The poll_and_all_reduce in pd-disaggregation decode mode would cause a lot of CPU overhead when there are always new incoming requests or transferring requests.

Adding a polling interval would reduce the ITL when decoding bs is small.
WarningThis is only a hack and will be removed once overlapping

sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Bug description

cutlass_moe nvfp4 has bad accuracy
changing multiple moe backends does fix the accuracy (e.g. cutedsl_moe, fp8, all good)
changing multiple attention backends does not fix the accuracy (e.g. trtllm_mla, cutlass_mla, flashinfer, all bad)

Direct cause

attention core funct

vllm.title: [Chore] Remove unused batched RoPE op & kernel
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
IIUC, batched RoPE is only used when different LoRA adapters have different rope scaling factor.
Now that this feature is dropped in #21169, we can remove this op for simplication.

vllm.title: [Kernels][DP/EP] Optimize Silu Kernel for R1
vllm.author: elvircrn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The purpose of this PR is to replace the triton silu implementation with a faster cuda version.
Here's a benchmark slice:

This was achieved by launching additional cuda blocks and parallelizing over T dimension. This means that we end up launching NOOP threads and that the parallelization f

vllm.title: [Core][Multimodal] Cache `supports_kw`
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
supports_kw is surprisingly slow due to inspect.signature.

Since it's called multiple times on every request (every time get_hf_processor is called) I think it makes sense to cache it. Let me know if this could lead to problems.
